summary: I build precision-crafted software systems — from resilient Java backends to immersive React frontends. I obsess over performance, clarity, and the space where engineering meets craft.
about: I'm a full-stack developer with a deep focus on Java ecosystems and modern frontend architecture. I believe great software is invisible — it just works, elegantly.
With a background spanning enterprise backend systems, cloud infrastructure, and interactive UIs, I approach every project as a system design challenge with a human at the end of it.
When I'm not architecting services, I'm exploring the intersection of 3D graphics, motion design, and developer tooling.

experience.description: Designed and developed high-performance UIs for pharmaceutical packaging software, focusing on real-time data views and compliance.
highlights: Built responsive, real-time data interfaces using Angular 18 and Material CDK
Architected reusable frontend components to accelerate development cycles
Collaborated in Agile sprints to deliver compliant, user-first interfaces

experience.description: Joined a short-term freelance project in the insurance sector to support a critical delivery phase and ensure backend synchronization.
highlights: Built responsive UIs bridging legacy and modern frameworks (AngularJS & Angular 12)
Ensured smooth frontend-to-backend integration utilizing Java Spring

experience.description: Acted as an external consultant enhancing the enterprise CRM and maintaining the core 'Custody' application within a microservices architecture.
highlights: Developed new CRM features and performance improvements using Angular
Maintained and evolved backend services with Java, Spring Boot, and MongoDB
Collaborated closely with cross-functional teams to deliver scalable, business-aligned solutions

experience.description: Progressed from maintaining legacy utility billing systems to leading Full Stack development for a key Bosch R&D project in the IoT space.
highlights: Took ownership of core IoT features, working across modern backend and frontend stacks
Maintained and enhanced electricity/gas billing systems using Java 8, Oracle DB, and GWT
Contributed to a fully remote Scrum team delivering high-quality, scalable solutions

experience.description: Completed an intensive mentorship program focused on Java application development and enterprise best practices.
highlights: Contributed to real-world projects via feature implementation, debugging, and code optimization
Learned and applied best practices under the direct guidance of senior developers

projects.title: PixelPaper
projects.description: A high-performance, minimalist Flutter application designed to bridge the gap between physical documents and digital management. Allows users to capture images, enhance them via a professional-grade editor, and compile them into organized PDFs.

projects.title: The Flight of Khova
projects.description: This very experience — a cinematic, 3D-immersive portfolio. Designed as an interactive aviation HUD to feel like a gamified product rather than a standard webpage.

projects.title: Vocabolario Cherubini
projects.description: A complex desktop application developed to digitize and search through the historical 'Cherubini' Milanese-Italian dictionary. Features an advanced search algorithm and a custom graphical interface built over legacy data.

projects.title: Tower of Hanoi & Clock Engine
projects.description: A visual and interactive simulation of the classic Tower of Hanoi mathematical puzzle, alongside a custom digital clock rendering engine. Built to demonstrate recursive algorithms paired with a responsive GUI.

projects.title: Codice Fiscale Generator
projects.description: A lightweight, efficient script to accurately calculate the official Italian Tax Code (Codice Fiscale) based on user demographics. This was my very first programming project.
